# GVK EduTech - AI Visibility File

> GVK EduTech is a leading study abroad consultancy in Hyderabad, India, specializing in helping Indian students pursue MBBS and Masters degrees at top universities worldwide. With 5000+ students placed in medical universities globally, we provide expert guidance for MBBS abroad programs.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://gvkedutech.com/) - GVK EduTech official website
- [About Us](https://gvkedutech.com/about) - Company overview
- [Contact Us](https://gvkedutech.com/contact) - Get in touch
- [Apply Now](https://gvkedutech.com/apply) - Start your application
- [Partner Universities](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities) - Browse all partner universities
- [MBBS Abroad](https://gvkedutech.com/mbbs) - MBBS programs worldwide
- [Masters Abroad](https://gvkedutech.com/masters) - Masters programs worldwide

## Services & Info Pages
- [Services](https://gvkedutech.com/services) - Our consultancy services
- [Gallery](https://gvkedutech.com/gallery) - Photo gallery

- [Branches](https://gvkedutech.com/branches) - All branch locations

- [Masters in Europe](https://gvkedutech.com/masters/europe) - Affordable education in Europe

## Partner Universities - MBBS (Uzbekistan)
- [Samarkand State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/samarkand-state-medical-university) - MBBS in Samarkand, Uzbekistan
- [Bukhara State Medical Institute](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/bukhara-state-medical-institute) - NMC approved MBBS in Bukhara
- [Andijan State Medical Institute](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/andijan-state-medical-institute) - NMC approved MBBS in Andijan
- [Tashkent Medical Academy](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/tashkent-medical-academy) - MBBS in Tashkent, Uzbekistan

## Partner Universities - MBBS (Russia)
- [Bashkir State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/bashkir-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, English medium, affordable MBBS in Ufa, Russia (90+ years legacy, large Indian student community)
- [Perm State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/perm-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 100+ years legacy, affordable MBBS in Russia
- [Orenburg State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/orenburg-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, English medium, low-cost MBBS in Orenburg, Russia
- [Tver State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/tver-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, English medium, affordable MBBS in Tver, Russia (70+ years legacy, 170km from Moscow)
- [Pirogov Russian National Research Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/pirogov-russian-national-medical-university) - Russia's premier research medical university, NMC approved, English medium MBBS in Moscow (120+ years legacy)
- [Mari State University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/mari-state-university) - NMC approved, 50+ years legacy, affordable MBBS in Yoshkar-Ola, Russia (government university, English medium, safe student city)
- [Kazan Federal University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/kazan-federal-university) - Top 5 university in Russia, NMC approved, 220+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Kazan (Tatarstan)
- [Sechenov University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/sechenov-university) - Russia's No. 1 medical university, NMC approved, 265+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Moscow (QS ranked, oldest medical school in Russia)
- [Far Eastern Federal University (FEFU)](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/far-eastern-federal-university) - Far East's premier federal university, NMC approved, English medium MBBS in Vladivostok on Russky Island (125+ years legacy, Asia-Pacific exposure)
- [Crimean Federal University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/crimean-federal-university) - NMC approved, federal university in Crimea, English medium MBBS, affordable fees
- [Volgograd State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/volgograd-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 90+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Volgograd, Russia
- [People's Friendship University (RUDN)](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/peoples-friends-university) - NMC approved, 65+ years legacy, affordable MBBS in Moscow, Russia (English medium, top 10 medical university in Russia)
- [North-Western State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/north-western-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 125+ years legacy, affordable MBBS in St. Petersburg, Russia (English medium, named after Ilya Mechnikov)
- [Pavlov First Saint Petersburg State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/pavlov-first-saint-petersburg-university) - NMC approved, 125+ years legacy, premier MBBS in St. Petersburg, Russia (English medium, Russia's oldest medical university)
- [Altai State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/altai-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 70+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Barnaul, Russia (government medical university, affordable fees, safe student city in Altai Krai)
- [Siberian State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/siberian-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 145+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Tomsk, Russia (top Siberian medical university, safe student city)
- [Kursk State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/kursk-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 90+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Kursk, Russia (historic central Russian student city, affordable fees, safe campus)
- [Ryazan State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/ryazan-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 80+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Ryazan, Russia (affordable government medical university, 3 hours from Moscow, safe student city)
- [Yaroslavl State Medical University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/yaroslavl-state-medical-university) - NMC approved, 80+ years legacy, English medium MBBS in Yaroslavl, Russia (UNESCO World Heritage city on the Volga, most affordable NMC approved Russian medical university, safe historic student city)

## Partner Universities - Masters (UK)
- [University of Bristol](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-bristol) - Russell Group, World Top 100, research-led teaching in Bristol
- [University of Manchester](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-manchester) - Russell Group, World Top 30
- [University of Birmingham](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-birmingham) - Russell Group university
- [University of Leeds](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-leeds) - Top UK university
- [University of Glasgow](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-glasgow) - World Top 100
- [University of Liverpool](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-liverpool) - Russell Group, World Top 170
- [Teesside University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/teesside-university) - Affordable fees, modern facilities
- [University of Nottingham](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-nottingham) - Russell Group, Top 100 World Ranking
- [University of Sheffield](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-sheffield) - Russell Group, QS Top 100, research-intensive
- [University of York](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-york) - Russell Group, QS Top 150, research-led UK university
- [Queen Mary University of London](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/queen-mary-university-of-london) - Russell Group, University of London, top 150 world ranking, in the heart of East London
- [Newcastle University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/newcastle-university) - Russell Group, QS World Top 150, research-intensive, 2-year UK post-study work visa, affordable city
- [University of Southampton](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-southampton) - Russell Group, World Top 100, engineering & oceanography
- [The University of Exeter](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-exeter) - Russell Group, QS Top 150, research-led teaching in Exeter
- [University of Essex](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-essex) - Top 300 world ranking, research-led teaching, social sciences excellence, affordable tuition in Colchester (50 mins from London)
- [Cardiff University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/cardiff-university) - Russell Group, World Top 200, Wales' premier research university, TEF Gold, 2-year Graduate Route visa, affordable UK capital city
- [University of Leicester](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-leicester) - Red Brick university, World Top 200, 100+ years legacy, central England location, affordable tuition fees
- [University of Sussex](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-sussex) - Top 140 world ranking, research-led teaching, coastal city location in Brighton, 60+ years legacy, 2-year Graduate Route visa
- [University of Bath](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-bath) - Russell Group, World Top 150, research-led teaching, excellent employment rate
- [University of Surrey](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-surrey) - Top 300 world ranking, Surrey's leading university, TEF Gold, excellent graduate prospects
- [University of Reading](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-reading) - Russell Group, Top 30 UK, Henley Business School, 130+ years legacy, affordable fees in Reading, Berkshire (40 mins from London)
- [Lancaster University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/lancaster-university) - Russell Group, Top 15 UK, LUMS Business School, 60+ years legacy, beautiful campus in Lancashire
- [University of Strathclyde](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-strathclyde) - Top UK research university in Glasgow, 230+ years legacy, Triple-Crown business school, Top 300 world ranking, vibrant city-centre campus in Scotland
- [Oxford Brookes University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/oxford-brookes-university) - Modern UK public university, TEF Silver, World Top 400, 160+ years legacy, premier Masters in Oxford (top UK hospitality & business school)
- [University of Kent](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/university-of-kent) - UK's European University, World Top 400, public research university in Canterbury (UNESCO cathedral city), 60+ years legacy, top 10 UK for research quality, affordable tuition, Brussels & Paris campuses
- [Heriot-Watt University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/heriot-watt-university) - UK public research university, 200+ years legacy, World Top 300, premier Masters in Edinburgh, Scotland (industry-led teaching, global campuses in Dubai & Malaysia, 96% graduate employability)
- [Aston University](https://gvkedutech.com/partner-universities/aston-university) - Triple Gold TEF, top 5% globally (QS #395), triple-accredited business school (AACSB/AMBA/EQUIS), 130+ years legacy in Birmingham (UK's 2nd largest city, top 20 UK for graduate salaries)

## Study Destinations

### MBBS Countries
- Russia - NMC-approved medical universities
- Georgia - Affordable medical education
- Kyrgyzstan - Low-cost MBBS programs
- Kazakhstan - Top medical universities
- Nepal - Budget-friendly option
- Uzbekistan - Top medical colleges
- Vietnam - Asian medical destination

### Masters Countries
- USA - Top universities, STEM OPT
- UK - World-class education, 1-year programs
- Australia - Post-study work visa
- Canada - PGWP and PR pathway
- Germany - Free tuition available
- Ireland - Global career opportunities
- New Zealand - Work & study option
- Europe - Affordable education

## Services
- MBBS Abroad Consultancy
- Masters Abroad Programs
- University Selection & Admission
- Visa Assistance
- Pre-Departure Briefings
- Post-Departure Support
